name: Orq.ai
description: Orq.ai — LLM deployment and experimentation platform for managing prompts, model routing, and A/B testing.

seo.title: Orq.ai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Orq.ai: Orq.ai — LLM deployment and experimentation platform for managing prompts, model routing, and A/B testing.

when_to_use: Managing LLM deployments with config-driven model switching
A/B testing prompts and model variants in production safely
Centralizing LLM cost tracking and usage analytics
Rolling out prompt changes with feature flags and canary traffic

pros: Model routing across OpenAI, Anthropic, others
Built-in A/B testing and eval dashboards
cons: Adds a vendor between app and model APIs
Requires rewriting prompts into platform format
review.verdict: Solid LLMOps layer if you manage many prompts across models, but justify the added dependency carefully.
review.best_for: LLM teams managing many prompts and multi-model routing
review.not_for: Single-model apps where one provider SDK is sufficient

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
